children.heading: Establishment of Fund
children.label: a Establishment of Fund
children.text: There is established in the Treasury an interest bearing fund to be known as the “Marine Mammal Unusual Mortality Event Fund”, which shall consist of amounts deposited into the Fund under subsection (c).

to make advance, partial, or progress payments under contracts or other funding mechanisms for property, supplies, salaries, services, and travel costs incurred in acting in accordance with the contingency plan issued under or under the direction of an Onsite Coordinator for an unusual mortality event designated under ;section 1421c(b) of this titlesection 1421c(a)(2)(B)(iii) of this title

for reimbursing any stranding network participant for costs incurred in the collection, preparation, analysis, and transportation of marine mammal tissues and samples collected with respect to an unusual mortality event for the Tissue Bank; and
for the care and maintenance of a marine mammal seized under ; andsection 1374(c)(2)(D) of this title1So in original. The “; and” probably should be a period.1
other amounts appropriated to the Secretary for use with respect to unusual mortality events; and
amounts received by the United States in the form of gifts, devises, and bequests under subsection (d).

children.heading: Acceptance of donations
children.label: d Acceptance of donations
children.text: For purposes of carrying out this subchapter and , the Secretary may accept, solicit, and use the services of volunteers, and may accept, solicit, receive, hold, administer, and use gifts, devises, and bequests.section 1374(c)(2)(D) of this title
